title: Understanding Requirements Engineering Debt: Study Material
author: Frattini, Julian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This upload contains additional material for the study titled "An initial Theory to Understand and Manage Requirements Engineering Debt in Practice." In detail, the upload contains 

 
	 the interview protocol as well as the codebook used for coding the interview transcripts, 
	 the survey protocol including all survey questions, and 
	 an initial attempt at visualizing the resulting theory. 
 

 Note that any sensitive data (interview transcripts, survey responses) could not be disclosed.
